beIN SPORTS NEWS.desc_ar: Kuala Lumpur, the capital of Malaysia, is in the spotlight as it hosts the draw for the 2026 AFC Champions League finals. This esteemed event is set to occur on Wednesday, March 25, at 10  AM Doha Time, at the headquarters of the Asian Football Confederation. The draw ceremony will determine the pairings from the Quarter-finals to the showdown Final, with all seven single-leg battles to take place between April 16 and 25 in Jeddah, Saudi Arabia.
